org.docgene.model

Interface RootElement

  • All Superinterfaces:
    org.docgene.model.globals.PackagedElement
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    Article, XMLParentArticle, XMLRootElement
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractXMLParentArticle, ArticleCategory, ArticlesCategories, ArticlesDictionary, ArticlesGlossary, HeaderElement, OpaqueArticle, XMLArticle, XMLDisambArticle, XMLFallbackArticle, XMLFooter, XMLHeader, XMLIndex, XMLRawHTMLArticle, XMLRedirect

    public interface RootElement
extends org.docgene.model.globals.PackagedElement
    Represents an element with an ID and an input file.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static short ARTICLE
      Represents an article.
      static short CATEGORIES
      Represents the categories.
      static short CATEGORY
      Represents a category.
      static short DICTIONARY
      Represents the dictionnary.
      static short FOOTER
      Represents the footer.
      static short FULL_TEXT_SEARCH
      Represents the full text search page.
      static short GLOSSARY
      Represents the glossary.
      static short HEADER
      Represents the header.
      static short IMAGES_DEFINITION
      Represents a list of images definition.
      static short INFOBOX_DEFINITION
      Represents an infobox definition.
      static short INFOBOX_PROPERTY
      Represents an infobox property.
      static short RESOURCES_DEFINITION
      Represents a list of resources definition.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Default Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.lang.String getID()
      Return the element ID.
      java.io.File getInputFile()
      Return the element associated input file.
      org.docgene.model.globals.RootDirectory getRoot()
      Return the root directory.
      short getRootElementType()
      Return the element type.
      default boolean hasInputFile()
      Return true if the element has an associated input file.
      default boolean hasRoot()
      Return true if the root directory exists.
      default boolean isArticle()
      Return true if the element is an article.
      default boolean isFallback()
      Return true if it is a fallback element.

      • Methods inherited from interface org.docgene.model.globals.PackagedElement

        getPackage, hasPackage
